name: The Don Pays His Respects
text:
Each opponent sacrifices half their creatures, rounded up out of respect, down out of mercy — you decide, per opponent, which way you're feeling. Hold a moment of silence at the table; anyone who speaks during it owes you a Favor (create a Favor token).
Return all creatures that died this way to the battlefield under your control. They work for the family now. They always did, really.
flavorText: He attends every funeral in Whateverville. Often, he scheduled it.
